label: Component VaR
description: Horizontal bar chart showing marginal VaR contribution by position, sorted by risk impact.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 pass — availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 fix applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (before method buttons and chart). 0.7 pass — adjustedVarData.length === 0 guard already present. 0.8 fix applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — reads adjustedVarData, varMethod, setVarMethod exclusively from useRiskData() hook. 1.2 pass — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); componentVarData from API; adjustedVarData is componentVarData adjusted by varMethod multiplier and regimeMultiplier. 1.3 pass — scope org filter propagates via scopeReductionFactor applied to VaR totals; position-level filtering via scopeStrategyIds. 1.4 pass — clientIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.5 pass — strategyIds threaded through getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 pass — empty scopeStrategyIds uses full dataset (reduction factor 1.0). 1.7 pass — no reference data in widget file.

findings: L0.6: Added isLoading -> Spinner guard (was missing; method toggle buttons also hidden during load)
L0.8: Added hasError -> error message guard (was missing)
